posture: 18 roles · 8 strong-act · 2 interim/contract worth fast action — senior-manager risk/governance roles now weighted as the core-target matches they are
summary: Expanded scan: the earlier runs under-covered Seek (it is JavaScript-rendered, so the web-search pass missed most live listings). A deeper Chrome-rendered pass of Seek surfaced a cluster of strong, currently-advertised matches — a Chief Risk Officer at Revesby Workers', a General Manager Business Performance & Operations at the Governance Institute of Australia, and several senior governance/risk/assurance roles (Oxygen Recruitment, Ink Recruitment, Cuscal, Teachers Mutual Bank, Ethos BeathChapman, Perigon Group) — plus a Sydney interim Financial Controller (Shippit, contract to early 2027) alongside the Sharp & Carter contract FC. Board/NED supply is steady (NSW audit-and-risk-committee panel, Board Direction, AICD teasers). All roles below were browser-verified live this evening; the Ink Recruitment Head of Governance role is flagged as closing soon. Note on coverage: Seek is sampled via a battery of keyword/classification searches read top-down, so older-but-live roles can sit below the fold — a manual look remains worthwhile.

items.headline: Independent Chairs & Members, Audit & Risk Committees — NSW Government (Sydney, prequalification panel)
items.summary: Standing NSW Government scheme (ProcurePoint SCM2421) that prequalifies independent chairs and members for the audit and risk committees of NSW departments and statutory bodies. Appointees serve on committees overseeing internal audit, risk management and internal controls.
items.so_what: Direct fit to your FAICD + audit/risk/governance profile and existing committee experience; getting on the panel positions you for multiple NSW committee appointments. Apply to join the register rather than to a single dated vacancy.

items.headline: Non-Executive Director vacancies across AU sectors — Board Direction listing platform
items.summary: Board Direction refreshes Australia's largest public NED listing roughly fortnightly; the latest batch (published through ~26 June) spans Education, Financial & Insurance Services, Health, Environment, NFP, Welfare and government across the states, with closing dates through July–August.
items.so_what: Worth a scan for interstate board seats (monthly-travel cadence acceptable per your rule); filter for FS/insurance/energy/government affinity. No single Sydney role isolated today — browse the live list.

items.headline: Directorship Opportunities — ~80 live board roles nationally (AICD, member-gated)
items.summary: AICD's Directorship Opportunities platform currently features 80+ board vacancies and adds ~15 new positions a week from up to 4,800 registered organisations. Only public teasers are visible without a member subscription (~$85–88/yr).
items.so_what: As an FAICD this is your richest board pipeline; teasers only here. Worth a manual look in DO this week to filter by sector/location and apply directly — log in on your own account.

items.headline: Chief Risk Officer (CRO) — Revesby Workers' Club, Revesby (Sydney metro)
items.summary: Permanent executive role owning the enterprise risk function at a large registered club/hospitality group in south-west Sydney — building and running the risk, compliance and assurance framework and reporting to the board/CEO.
items.so_what: Bullseye for your CRO target and risk/governance specialisation, and a board-facing C-suite seat in Sydney metro. Strong direct match — apply now and reference your FCPA/FAICD and StateCover/Ku-ring-gai governance experience.

items.headline: Executive Director, Finance & Strategy (CFO) — NSW Reconstruction Authority (Sydney)
items.summary: Senior NSW Government CFO-level role providing strategic leadership of financial and performance management for the Reconstruction Authority. A published role description was located; its current advertising/open status could not be confirmed in this run.
items.so_what: Strong level/sector fit (public-sector C-suite finance, Sydney) to your CFO/COO targets. Verify it is currently open before acting — treat as a lead to confirm on I Work for NSW / the agency site.

items.headline: General Manager, Business Performance & Operations — Governance Institute of Australia, Sydney
items.summary: Senior GM role at the peak body for governance and risk professionals, leading operations, finance/business performance and corporate enablement functions across the organisation.
items.so_what: Direct fit to your GM/COO targets with strong governance-sector affinity and Sydney location — a rare role that rewards exactly your FAICD + operations/finance blend. Apply promptly while freshly listed.

items.headline: Financial Controller (Contract) — international scale-up, Sydney CBD (Sharp & Carter)
items.summary: Live contract role on Sharp & Carter's finance contract desk: a hands-on, year-end-focused Financial Controller for a growing Australian scale-up with overseas subsidiaries, owning statutory reporting and leading a complex external audit while managing a small team. Sydney CBD, hybrid, daily rate, immediate start; CA or CPA required.
items.so_what: Direct fit to your FCPA + financial-control background and a §1a specialist-recruiter contract role where speed matters — contact Sharp & Carter and apply today while you're immediately available. Browser-verified live this afternoon.

items.headline: Interim Financial Controller (contract to ~March 2027) — Shippit, Darling Point (Sydney)
items.summary: Fixed-term interim Financial Controller for a Sydney technology/logistics scale-up, covering core financial control, reporting and team leadership through to early 2027.
items.so_what: A genuine Sydney interim/contract FC engagement — exactly the speed-critical surface the spec prioritises and a direct fit to your financial-control background. Move quickly; interim finance briefs fill fast.

items.headline: Finance Manager (Contract, immediate start) — IT organisation, Sydney (Sharp & Carter)
items.summary: Sydney-based hands-on Finance Manager on the Sharp & Carter contract desk with a recognisable IT organisation, supporting management and reporting of the company's finances; immediate/short-notice start.
items.so_what: On-target function and Sydney location, and a genuine contract engagement; as a plain Manager-level role it is in-scope but capped at watch per the seniority rule. Quick to action if you want a near-term contract bridge.

items.headline: Head of Governance & Assurance — recruiter-held, Sydney (Ink Recruitment) — closing soon
items.summary: A 'Head of' governance and assurance leadership role held by Ink Recruitment for a Sydney client, owning the governance, assurance and controls agenda. Listing is flagged as expiring on Seek.
items.so_what: Strong title/function match ('Head of' + governance/assurance) in Sydney and eligible for any tier — but it's closing imminently, so apply or contact the recruiter today if it appeals.

items.headline: Senior Manager, Governance and Enablement — recruiter-held, Sydney (Oxygen Recruitment & HR)
items.summary: Senior management role leading a governance and enablement function for a Sydney organisation, spanning governance frameworks, policy and operational uplift.
items.so_what: Senior-manager-level governance role in Sydney — solid fit to your governance/assurance strengths. Worth a direct application or a call to the recruiter.

items.headline: Senior Manager, Finance Risk, Controls & Governance — Cuscal, Sydney
items.summary: Senior management role at payments/financial-services provider Cuscal, leading finance risk, internal controls and governance across the finance function.
items.so_what: Blends your finance and risk/governance strengths in a financial-services setting in Sydney — strong on-target fit at senior-manager level. Apply directly.

items.headline: Senior Controls Assurance Manager — Teachers Mutual Bank, Sydney
items.summary: Manager-plus role leading controls assurance and operational risk within a mutual bank, testing and uplifting the internal control environment. Freshly listed today.
items.so_what: Strong sector affinity (mutual / member-owned, matching your StateCover Mutual background) plus risk/assurance function in Sydney — a relevant senior assurance seat. Apply early while newly posted.

items.headline: Senior Risk Manager — recruiter-held, Sydney (Ethos BeathChapman)
items.summary: Senior enterprise/operational risk management role held by search firm Ethos BeathChapman for a Sydney client; full-time, hybrid, leading risk framework, appetite and reporting activity.
items.so_what: Direct on-target fit to your risk specialisation at senior-manager level in Sydney. Contact the recruiter or apply directly; listed a couple of weeks ago so confirm it's still open.

items.headline: Senior Manager — Risk & Resilience — recruiter-held, Sydney (Perigon Group)
items.summary: Senior management role spanning enterprise risk and operational/business resilience for a Sydney organisation, held by recruiter Perigon Group.
items.so_what: Strong fit to your risk/governance and operations strengths at senior-manager level in Sydney — a relevant, recently listed seat. Worth a direct application or recruiter call.

items.headline: Manager, Governance — NSW Government (Sydney City)
items.summary: Public-sector management role leading governance, internal audit, risk and compliance initiatives within a NSW Government entity.
items.so_what: On-target function and Sydney location; as a plain Manager-level role it is in-scope but lower priority (capped at watch). Solid governance/risk fit if open to a public-sector management seat.

items.headline: Manager, Cyber Security Governance, Risk & Compliance — NSW Government (Sydney City)
items.summary: Manager-level GRC role spanning cyber security governance, risk and compliance for a NSW Government entity.
items.so_what: Blends your risk/compliance and IT-leadership affinity; Sydney-based. Manager level so capped at watch — relevant if the security-GRC angle appeals.

items.headline: Senior Governance Officer — Corporate Governance, Audit & Risk, NSW Government (Sydney)
items.summary: Officer-level role supporting corporate governance, audit and risk/compliance functions within a NSW Government entity.
items.so_what: Below your target level (officer, not manager), so awareness only — useful as a read on where NSW governance teams are hiring rather than a role to chase.
